title: StockEventHistoryDto
description: A single transaction history row (issue or receive stock event).

documentNumber.description: Generated document number of the event.

type.description: Transaction type, read from the event origin.

signature.description: Signature of the user who performed the event.

occurredDate.description: Earliest occurred date across the event's line items (ISO date).

processedDate.description: Date and time the stock event was processed (ISO date-time with zone).

entriesCount.description: Count of stock event line item entries in the event.

userId.description: Id of the user who performed the transaction.

username.description: Resolved username of the user who performed the transaction.
